summary: CARE is a comprehensive health insurance product offering coverage with sum insured options ranging from 7L to 1 Cr, featuring unlimited automatic recharge, cumulative bonus benefits, and extensive coverage including in-patient care, day care treatments, AYUSH treatment, and optional OPD coverage.
coverage: In-Patient Care up to Sum Insured
Day Care Treatment - All Day Care Procedures up to Sum Insured
Room Rent - All Category Rooms Allowed
Advance Technology Methods up to Sum Insured
Pre-Hospitalization Medical Expenses up to Sum Insured, up to 60 days prior to hospitalization
Post Hospitalization Medical Expenses up to Sum Insured, up to 180 days after discharge
AYUSH Treatment up to Sum Insured
Domiciliary Hospitalization up to Sum Insured
Organ Donor Cover up to Sum Insured
Road Ambulance Cover up to Rs.10,000 per year for SI<15 Lacs, Up to SI for SI>=15 Lacs
Health Services Discount Connect for consultations, diagnostics, maternity etc. at network
waiting_periods: Initial Waiting Period: 30 Days for all Hospitalization except Accidental Hospitalization
claims_information: Cumulative Bonus: 50% of SI per year, max up to 100% of SI; Claim will not reduce Bonus Accrued
Unlimited Automatic Recharge: Available for unlimited times for unrelated or same illness

faqs.question: What are the sum insured options available?
faqs.answer: Sum insured options are 7L/10L/15L/25L/50L & 1 Cr

faqs.question: What is the minimum age for a proposer?
faqs.answer: The minimum age for a proposer is 18 years or above

faqs.question: What is the minimum entry age for adults and children?
faqs.answer: Minimum entry age for adults is 18 years and for children is 5 years or 91 days for family floater

faqs.question: What is the maximum entry age for adults and children?
faqs.answer: There is no upper age limit for adults, and maximum entry age for children is 24 years

faqs.question: What is the exit age for adults and children?
faqs.answer: Adults can continue lifelong, and children can continue until 25 years

faqs.question: What cover types are available?
faqs.answer: Individual cover for max up to 6 persons and Floater cover for max up to 2A2C (2 Adults 2 Children)

faqs.question: What are the tenure options available?
faqs.answer: Tenure options are 1/2/3 Years

faqs.question: How many pricing zones are there?
faqs.answer: There are 4 pricing zones: Zone 1 (Delhi NCR, Surat, Mathura, Aligarh), Zone 1A (Mumbai MMR, Rest of Gujarat), Zone 2 (Pune, Indore, Nashik, Telangana), and Zone 3 (Rest of India)

faqs.question: Who can be covered under this policy?
faqs.answer: Self, spouse/live-in partner/same sex partner, son, daughter, father, mother, mother-in-law, father-in law, grandfather, grandmother can be covered

faqs.question: What is the initial waiting period?
faqs.answer: Initial waiting period is 30 days for all hospitalization except accidental hospitalization

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for named ailments?
faqs.answer: Named ailment waiting period is 24 months

faqs.question: What is the waiting period for pre-existing diseases?
faqs.answer: Pre-existing diseases waiting period is 36 months

faqs.question: Is there any room rent restriction?
faqs.answer: No, all category rooms are allowed

faqs.question: Is there any limit on ICU charges?
faqs.answer: No, there is no limit on ICU charges

faqs.question: How many days of pre-hospitalization expenses are covered?
faqs.answer: Pre-hospitalization medical expenses are covered up to 60 days prior to hospitalization

faqs.question: How many days of post-hospitalization expenses are covered?
faqs.answer: Post-hospitalization medical expenses are covered up to 180 days after discharge

faqs.question: Is AYUSH treatment covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, AYUSH treatment is covered up to sum insured

faqs.question: What is the ambulance cover limit?
faqs.answer: Road ambulance cover is up to Rs.10,000 per year for SI<15 Lacs, and up to SI for SI>=15 Lacs

faqs.question: How does the cumulative bonus work?
faqs.answer: Cumulative bonus is 50% of SI per year, maximum up to 100% of SI, and claims will not reduce bonus accrued

faqs.question: How does the automatic recharge feature work?
faqs.answer: Unlimited automatic recharge is available for unlimited times for unrelated or same illness

faqs.question: Are e-consultations available?
faqs.answer: Yes, unlimited e-consultations are available with general physicians

faqs.question: What is Health Services Discount Connect?
faqs.answer: It provides discounts on services such as consultations, diagnostics, maternity etc. at the network

faqs.question: How many physical consultations with general physicians are covered under CARE OPD?
faqs.answer: Each insured is eligible for 4 physical consultations from a general physician in a year with max Rs.500 reimbursement per consultation

faqs.question: How many specialist consultations are covered under CARE OPD?
faqs.answer: Each insured is eligible for 4 physical consultations from 14 specified specialists in a year with max Rs.500 reimbursement per consultation

faqs.question: Which specialists are covered under CARE OPD?
faqs.answer: Pediatrician, Psychiatrist, Obstetrics and Gynecologist, Cardiologist, Homeopathic Physician, Neurologist, Dietician, Orthopedic Surgeon, Diabetologist, Nephrologist, Dermatologist, ENT Specialist, Pulmonologist, Gastroenterologist

faqs.question: Is OPD coverage included in the main policy?
faqs.answer: No, OPD coverage is provided under add-on policy CARE OPD

faqs.question: Is domiciliary hospitalization covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, domiciliary hospitalization is covered up to sum insured

faqs.question: Is organ donor cover included?
faqs.answer: Yes, organ donor cover is included up to sum insured

faqs.question: Are day care procedures covered?
faqs.answer: Yes, all day care procedures are covered up to sum insured
